sentences.text: Good morning, Jenna.
How are you?
Pretty good and yourself?
I'm wonderful.
Thanks so much for joining me today.
Oh, thank you so much for the like stability, especially with my schedule.
I really appreciate it.
Absolutely.
I apologize for having to change it last minute.
I hate having to change time.
So it's only right that I provide you with some one on one support to compensate for that.
That's awesome.
Well, thank you.
Appreciate that.
Absolutely.
Well, tell me a little bit about your role, Jenna.
Are you a regional manager?
Property manager?
Yeah.
No.
So I'm a senior regional here in Minnesota.

Um So, you know, I just want to kind of make sure that I'm utilizing apartment IQ to the best that I can, you know, I can look at stuff and things like that, but I just want to make sure that, you know, I'm not missing any potential good reporting that I can be looking at, just especially with ownership, you know, they ask all those questions.
Um So that's kind of like my main point is just trying to figure and making sure that I can get the best knowledge I can.
Uh through, um, you know, training.
Absolutely.
And tell me a little bit about like the metrics and, uh, points that you have to report on to ownership so that I can make sure to show you where that is.
Um, you know, usually, of course, you know, just trying to see where, you know, the comps are in compared to us, in regards to I've seen in dollar per square foot.
I think that is usually so essential for them.
Um, just because they look at a lot about the trade outs and things like that.
So, you know, that's kind of like, you know, finding that right?
Uh, and easy reports, it would be good for them to see rather than having this report, it might be 20 pages and it doesn't tell them anything.
Like, is there a good report that we can always send them?

I know they usually, you know, I pull the one that is kind of like the simple one where it has like the concessions and things like that, but sometimes they are like looking at a little bit deeper than that.
And I'm like, oh, I don't know what else, you know, I can send them.
So main thing I will say, you know, average rent a dollar per square foot, things like that.
That's kind of what they're usually interested on.
Beautiful.
Ok.

The great thing is when you customize these metrics, you can actually pull customized reporting via the Excel report.
